name: word-password-generator
title: Word Password Generator
description: Generates secure and memorable passwords using random words with customizable length and structure.
author: 2w8m2bjyc2

commands.name: generate-password
commands.title: Generate Password
commands.subtitle: Create a password from random words
commands.description: Generates a secure password using randomly selected words with customizable options.

preferences.name: generationMode
preferences.title: Generation Mode
preferences.description: Choose whether to use a fixed word count or match an exact total length.

preferences.name: wordCount
preferences.title: Word Count
preferences.description: Select how many words to include before optional suffixes.

preferences.name: separator
preferences.title: Separator
preferences.description: Choose the separator inserted between generated words.

preferences.name: caseMode
preferences.title: Case
preferences.description: Choose how generated words are cased before optional leet replacements.

preferences.name: leetMode
preferences.title: Leet Mode
preferences.description: Replace common letters with deterministic leet substitutions.
preferences.label: Apply deterministic leet replacements

preferences.name: wordLengthProfile
preferences.title: Word Length Profile
preferences.description: Prefer shorter or longer words when building the password.

preferences.name: targetLength
preferences.title: Target Length
preferences.description: Set the exact total password length in Target Length mode.
preferences.placeholder: Used only in Target Length mode

preferences.name: appendDigits
preferences.title: Digits
preferences.description: Append random digits after the word portion.
preferences.label: Append random digits

preferences.name: digitCount
preferences.title: Digit Count
preferences.description: Choose how many random digits to append when digits are enabled.

preferences.name: appendSymbol
preferences.title: Symbol
preferences.description: Append one special symbol after any digit suffix.
preferences.label: Append one special symbol

preferences.name: specialSymbol
preferences.title: Special Symbol
preferences.description: Choose the special symbol appended when symbol suffix is enabled.

preferences.name: easyToType
preferences.title: Easy to Type
preferences.description: Reject words with harder keyboard patterns.
preferences.label: Prefer simpler keyboard-friendly words

preferences.name: avoidAwkwardClusters
preferences.title: Avoid Awkward Clusters
preferences.description: Reject joined words that create dense consonant clusters.
preferences.label: Reject hard-to-read joins

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the "prepublishOnly" script and rerun "npm publish" again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use "npm run publish" instead.

" && exit 1
